name: node-ieee754
title: node-ieee754
summary: Node.js module to read or write IEEE754 floating point numbers
description:
Node.js module to read or write IEEE754 floating point numbers
ieee754 lets you read binary data from a buffer into javascript
number data types and write it back into binary buffer.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-ieee754 because Node.js module to read or write IEEE754 floating point numbers.

When validating lab setup, run `node-ieee754 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
